name: Create tool
description: Create a NEW tool for this app when the user explicitly asks for one: writes a tool package (manifest + Python code) into the tool library. The new tool starts disabled until the user reviews and enables it in Settings. Only call this when the user asked to create/build a tool.

name.description: Short human name of the new tool, e.g. 'Word counter'

description.description: One sentence: when should a model call this tool?

parameters.description: JSON Schema object for the run() arguments, as a JSON string: {"type":"object","properties":{...},"required":[...]}

code.description: Complete Python source of tool.py defining def run(...) -> str (see the authoring reference)

network.description: true only if the code accesses the internet
